calendar.matters:
Notice Of Petition And Petition For Order To Show Cause And For Order Compelling Compliance With Investigational Subpoena Duces Tecum; Declarations And Exhibits In Support Thereof; [Proposed] Order To Show Cause
Off Calendar Jan-12-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PETITIONER KIMBERLY KIRCHMEYER's Petition For Order To Show Cause And For Order Compelling Compliance With Investigational Subpoena Duces Tecum.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling, as follow:

No opposition filed; motion granted. Unless other arrangements are made between counsel for the AG's office and Dr. Matusumura, Dr. Matusumura shall comply with the subpoena and appear and produce documents on January 27, 2023 at 9 a.m. at the Division of Investigation, Health Quality Investigation Unit, 1855 Gateway Blvd Suite 320, Concord, California.

Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: Sean Kane / R. Sahatjian; Not Reported (302/JPT)
